name: Philomaxcap AG
summary: Philomaxcap AG engages in the production, advice, purchase, sale, and distribution of media and its by-products in Germany. The company was formerly known as Phicomm AG and changed its name to Philomaxcap AG in June 2020. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Munich, Germany. Philomaxcap AG is a subsidiary of Philocity Holdings Sdn Bhd.
